attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT,
RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
SUM(MJET.DV_USD_AMT )/ COUNT( DISTINCT MJET.EMPL_ID) AS AVG_PER_HEAD_QTR	              
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_JEL_EMPLOYEE_TRAVEL MJET
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.R_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY RMH
ON RMH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE = MJET.DD_BK_DEPT_CD
AND RMH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE = MJET.BK_COMPANY_CD 
AND MJET.EMPL_ID  <>'-999'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMTY
ON 	MJET.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT = 	RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT	
GROUP BY RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT,RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT

SELECT SVJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT ,
SVJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT  AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT ,
SVJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              ,
SVJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS BK_COMPANY_CD ,
SVJEL.DD_BK_DEPT_CD  ,
SVJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD  ,
SVJEL.DD_BK_PROJECT_CD ,
SVJEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
SVJEL.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR      ,
(SVJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT    - SVJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT) AS DV_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT   ,
(SVJEL.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT           - SVJEL.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT ) AS   DV_USD_AMT      , 
(SVJEL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT       - SVJEL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT ) AS DV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT    ,
-99999 AS VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY,
-999 AS VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY,
-999 AS EMPL_ID, /* BASED ON DIFFERENT UPDATE STATEMENTS IT WILL UPDATED FROM JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR */
-99999 AS EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY,
SVJEL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE AS FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD  ,
'UNK' AS  TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
-999 AS AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY,
SVJEL.SS_CD,
SVJEL.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
SVJEL.DD_BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
SVJEL.DD_BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
SVJEL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD,
SVJEL.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD,
SVJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD
FROM 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE SVJEL 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.R_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_HIERARCHY SVFAH
		ON 	SVFAH.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = SVJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
			AND SVFAH.LEVEL03_ACCT_GROUP_ID ='Expense'	
			AND SVFAH.LEVEL05_ACCT_GROUP_ID IN ('Air Travel') 
WHERE 
SVJEL.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > ( SELECT MAX(JOB_STREAM_END_TIME ) LAST_EXTRACT_DATE 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAM_RUNS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID ='wf_N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE')
AND  (SVJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT ,SVJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT ,
SVJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE, SVJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY ,SVJEL.RU_VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY )  
NOT IN ( SELECT BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT, BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT ,BK_COMPANY_CD ,SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY ,VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY FROM 
$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_JEL_EMPLOYEE_TRAVEL )
AND SVJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD IN ('MO','MC')

SELECT RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT,
MJET.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
SUM(MJET.DV_USD_AMT )/ COUNT( DISTINCT MJET.EMPL_ID) AS USD_PER_HEAD                   
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_JEL_EMPLOYEE_TRAVEL MJET
INNER JOIN 
$$FINLGLVWDB.R_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY RMH
ON RMH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE = MJET.DD_BK_DEPT_CD
AND RMH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE = MJET.BK_COMPANY_CD 
AND MJET.EMPL_ID  <>'-999'
GROUP BY RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT,MJET.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT

SELECT SVJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT ,
SVJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT  AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT ,
SVJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              ,
SVJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS BK_COMPANY_CD ,
SVJEL.DD_BK_DEPT_CD  ,
SVJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD  ,
SVJEL.DD_BK_PROJECT_CD ,
SVJEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
SVJEL.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR      ,
(SVJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT    - SVJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT) AS DV_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT   ,
(SVJEL.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT           - SVJEL.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT ) AS   DV_USD_AMT      , 
(SVJEL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT       - SVJEL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT ) AS DV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT    ,
NVID.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY,
NVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY AS VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY,
SVCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID AS EMPL_ID, /* BASED ON DIFFERENT UPDATE STATEMENTS IT WILL UPDATED FROM JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR */
NVID.EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY AS EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY,
SVJEL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE AS FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD  ,
NJSLFVI.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
NVI.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY AS AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY,
SVJEL.SS_CD,
SVJEL.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
SVJEL.DD_BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
SVJEL.DD_BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
SVJEL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD,
SVJEL.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD,
SVJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD,
'UNK' AS AP_VENDOR_NAME

FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JEL_SRC_LNK_FRM_VNDR_INVOICE NJSLFVI
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE SVJEL 
	ON 	SVJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT  = NJSLFVI.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT
		AND SVJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT    =NJSLFVI.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT
		AND SVJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE                =NJSLFVI.BK_COMPANY_CD
		AND SVJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY =NJSLFVI.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
		AND SVJEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT = NJSLFVI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT
		AND SVJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD IN ('MO','MC')
	
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION NVID
	ON NVID.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY = NJSLFVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY 
		
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.R_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_HIERARCHY SVFAH
		ON 	SVFAH.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = SVJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
			AND SVFAH.LEVEL03_ACCT_GROUP_ID ='Expense'	
			AND SVFAH.LEVEL05_ACCT_GROUP_ID IN ('Other T&E')
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE NVI
	ON NVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY = NVID.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY

LEFT OUTER  JOIN (
			SELECT 
NERLI.EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY,NER.ER_PURPOSE_DESCR ,NER.ER_CRT_CSCO_WRKR_EMP_PARTY_KEY             
FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE NERLI,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_REPORT NER
			WHERE  NERLI.EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY=NER.EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY
		) ERL
			ON	 NVID.EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY = ERL.EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY
			
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY SVCWP
ON SVCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY = COALESCE(ERL.ER_CRT_CSCO_WRKR_EMP_PARTY_KEY,-999)
WHERE 
NJSLFVI.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > ( SELECT MAX(JOB_STREAM_END_TIME ) LAST_EXTRACT_DATE 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAM_RUNS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID ='wf_N_JEL_SRC_LNK_FRM_VNDR_INVOICE')
AND  (NJSLFVI.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT ,NJSLFVI.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT ,
NJSLFVI.BK_COMPANY_CD, NJSLFVI.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY ,NJSLFVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY )  
NOT IN ( SELECT BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT, BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT ,BK_COMPANY_CD ,SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY ,VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY FROM 
$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_JEL_EMPLOYEE_TRAVEL )
